---
title: "محمد بكر"
subtitle: "CIA · CFE · عالم بيانات"
# image: ../assets/images/profile-pic.jpg
# image-alt: "صورة محمد بكر"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "لينكدإن"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "جيتهب"
      href: https://github.com/Mohdbakr
    - icon: globe
      aria-label: "الموقع"
      href: https://portfolio.mohdbakr.com
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

coming soon...
